print(is_palindrome("A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"))  # True

constraints: s consists only of printable ASCII characters

testCases.call: is_palindrome('A man, a plan, a canal: Panama')

title: Climbing Stairs

print(climb_stairs(2))   # Expected: 2
print(climb_stairs(3))   # Expected: 3
hints: Notice that ways(n) = ways(n-1) + ways(n-2). This is just Fibonacci! Use two variables to track the last two values.
